pg21-p1-s2: It may cause him to die a few years before his time.
pg21-p1-s3:
If a sufficiently strong reason - ill
health, falling in love, change of environment, or the warning of a doctor - becomes operative, this man can also stop
or moderate, although he may find it difficult and troublesome and may even need medical attention.
pg21-p1:
him physically and mentally. It may cause him to die a few years before his time. If a sufficiently strong reason - ill
health, falling in love, change of environment, or the warning of a doctor - becomes operative, this man can also stop
or moderate, although he may find it difficult and troublesome and may even need medical attention.
pg21-p2-s1: But what about the real alcoholic?
pg21-p2-s2:
He may start off as a moderate drinker; he may or may not become a continuous hard
drinker; but at some stage of his drinking career he begins to lose all control of his liquor consumption, once he
starts to drink.
pg21-p2:
But what about the real alcoholic? He may start off as a moderate drinker; he may or may not become a continuous hard
drinker; but at some stage of his drinking career he begins to lose all control of his liquor consumption, once he
starts to drink.
pg21-p3-s1: Here is the fellow who has been puzzling you, especially in his lack of control.
pg21-p3-s2:
He does absurd, incredible, tragic
things while drinking.
pg21-p3-s3: He is a real Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde.
pg21-p3-s5:
He is always more or less
insanely drunk.
pg21-p3-s6: His disposition while drinking resembles his normal nature but little.
pg21-p3-s7:
He may be one of the finest
fellows in the world.
pg21-p3-s8:
Yet let him drink for a day, and he frequently becomes disgustingly, and even dangerously
anti-social.
pg21-p3-s9:
He has a positive genius for getting tight at exactly the wrong moment, particularly when some important
decision must be made or engagement kept.
pg21-p3-s10:
He is often perfectly sensible and well balanced concerning everything except
liquor, but in that respect he is incredibly dishonest and selfish.
pg21-p3-s11:
He often possesses special abilities, skills, and
aptitudes, and has a promising career ahead of him.
pg21-p3-s12:
He uses his gifts to build up a bright outlook for his family and
himself, and then pulls the structure down on his head by a senseless series of sprees.
pg21-p3-s13:
He is the fellow who goes to bed
so intoxicated he ought to sleep the clock around.
pg21-p3:
Here is the fellow who has been puzzling you, especially in his lack of control. He does absurd, incredible, tragic
things while drinking. He is a real Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde. He is seldom mildly intoxicated. He is always more or less
insanely drunk. His disposition while drinking resembles his normal nature but little. He may be one of the finest
fellows in the world. Yet let him drink for a day, and he frequently becomes disgustingly, and even dangerously
anti-social. He has a positive genius for getting tight at exactly the wrong moment, particularly when some important
decision must be made or engagement kept. He is often perfectly sensible and well balanced concerning everything except
liquor, but in that respect he is incredibly dishonest and selfish. He often possesses special abilities, skills, and
aptitudes, and has a promising career ahead of him. He uses his gifts to build up a bright outlook for his family and
himself, and then pulls the structure down on his head by a senseless series of sprees. He is the fellow who goes to bed
so intoxicated he ought to sleep the clock around. Yet early next
